title: Tool Compat
description: A mod that adds missing tools for mods!
body:
# Tool Compat


Tool Compat is a simple mod that adds compat between different types of modded tools and materials.


### **Tools**


Knives from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

Machetes from [Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight)

Snow Shovels from [Frosted Friends](https://modrinth.com/mod/frosted-friends)

Scythes, Greatswords, Spears, Daggers, Katars, Scimitars, Crowbills and Katanas from [Simple Weapons for Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-weapons-for-better-combat)


### **Materials**


Copper, Zinc and Brass from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (Requires [Create Stuff & Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-stuff-additions))

Steel from [Create: Alloyed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-alloyed)

Ice from [Frosted Friends](https://modrinth.com/mod/frosted-friends)

Pendorite from [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)

Electrum from [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)

Warden from [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)

Tungsten and Chorundum from [Stalwart Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/stalwart-dungeons)

Rose Gold and Gilded Netherite from [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd)

Adamantite from [Enlightened](https://modrinth.com/mod/enlightend)

Diopside, Aquite, Pyrope, Charoite and Horizonite from [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)


## FAQ

Q: Does this add whole toolsets for materials without a toolset?

A: No, it only fills gaps, for example: you need Create Stuff & Additions because Create does not add toolsets itself.


Q: Can material x be added to tool y?

A: ~~Please use the [GitHub suggestion form](https://github.com/curryducker/ToolCompat/issues/new/choose)~~. We're currently not planning to add any more materials or tools any time soon.
